text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The weather, wind speed, humidity, and track
conditions are all perfect.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Based on past scrimmages I partook in under
identical conditions and my current physical
abilities...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm good to go! I can do this, Trainer! I'm
confident I can do well in this race!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I certainly will! I can't wait for you to see it!
